name: Persona
description: Identity verification and KYC/AML compliance API. Verify identities in 200+ countries using government IDs, selfies, database checks, and document verification. Manage inquiries, verifications, accounts, and reports.

capabilities.name: inquiries_create
capabilities.description: Create a new identity verification inquiry for an individual.

capabilities.name: inquiries_list
capabilities.description: List all inquiries with filtering and pagination.

capabilities.name: inquiries_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific inquiry by ID.

capabilities.name: inquiries_update
capabilities.description: Update fields on an existing inquiry.

capabilities.name: inquiries_approve
capabilities.description: Approve an inquiry, marking the identity as verified.

capabilities.name: inquiries_decline
capabilities.description: Decline an inquiry, marking the identity as not verified.

capabilities.name: inquiries_resume
capabilities.description: Generate a resume URL for an incomplete inquiry.

capabilities.name: inquiries_redact
capabilities.description: Permanently redact all PII from an inquiry.

capabilities.name: verifications_list
capabilities.description: List all verifications with filtering options.

capabilities.name: verifications_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific verification by ID.

capabilities.name: verifications_redact
capabilities.description: Permanently redact PII from a verification.

capabilities.name: accounts_create
capabilities.description: Create a new Persona account to group inquiries for a person.

capabilities.name: accounts_list
capabilities.description: List all accounts with filtering and pagination.

capabilities.name: accounts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific account by ID.

capabilities.name: accounts_update
capabilities.description: Update fields on an existing account.

capabilities.name: accounts_redact
capabilities.description: Permanently redact all PII from an account.

capabilities.name: reports_create
capabilities.description: Create a new background check or watchlist report.

capabilities.name: reports_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific report by ID.

capabilities.name: reports_list
capabilities.description: List all reports with filtering options.
